title: Simple Parachute [Color Update]
description: Adds A Simple Parachute To Minecraft
body:
- **Adds Simple Parachutes To Minecraft. That's It So Bye I Guess :)**
**To Use The Parachute Right Click With It In Your Mainhand When Falling**
- To Craft The Parachute Will Need Three White Wool, Two String, And Two Sticks

**Parachute Give Command /function parachute:give**
